{
  EmployeeActivator.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeActivatorRegistration
{
  [ModuleInitializer]
  internal static void Register() =>
    GeneratedActivators.Register<global::Employee>(Create);

  static global::Employee Create(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> values)
  {
    values.TryGetValue("Name", out var arg0);
    values.TryGetValue("Status", out var arg1);
    values.TryGetValue("Backup", out var arg2);
    return new global::Employee((string)arg0!, (global::Status)arg1!, (global::Status?)arg2!);
  }
},
  EmployeeEnumRenders.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeEnumRenderRegistration
{
  [ModuleInitializer]
  internal static void Register()
  {
    global::Excelsior.EnumRender<global::Status>.Set(static value => value switch
    {
      global::Status.FullTime => "Full time",
      global::Status.PartTime => "Part-time",
      global::Status.Contract => "Outside hire",
      global::Status.NDA => "NDA",
      _ => global::EnumExtensions.Humanize(value),
    });
  }
},
  EmployeeRowReader.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeRowReaderRegistration
{
  [ModuleInitializer]
  internal static void Register() =>
    GeneratedRowReaders.Register<global::Employee>(ReadRow);

  static global::Employee ReadRow(global::DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.Cell?[] cells, string?[]? sharedStrings, global::System.Action<int, string> onError)
  {
    return new global::Employee(global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[0], sharedStrings), global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadEnum<global::Status>(cells[1], sharedStrings, 1, onError), global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadEnumNullable<global::Status>(cells[2], sharedStrings, 2, onError));
  }
},
  EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions
{
  public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> NameColumn(
    this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
    Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, string>> configuration)
    => builder.Column(_ => _.Name, configuration);

  public static void NameHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
    => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Order(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Width(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
    => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
    => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
    => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
    => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
    => builder.Format(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
    => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
    => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Name);

  public static void NameRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
    => builder.Render(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, FormulaContext<global::Employee>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Employee>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
    => builder.Filter(_ => _.Name);

  public static void NameInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, bool value)
    => builder.Include(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
    => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Name);

  public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> StatusColumn(
    this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
    Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, global::Status>> configuration)
    => builder.Column(_ => _.Status, configuration);

  public static void StatusHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
    => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Status, value);

  public static void StatusOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Order(_ => _.Status, value);

  public static void StatusWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Width(_ => _.Status, value);

    => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Status, value);

  public static void StatusMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
    => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Status, value);

    => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Status, value);

  public static void StatusCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, global::Status> value)
    => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Status, value);

  public static void StatusFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
    => builder.Format(_ => _.Status, value);

  public static void StatusNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
    => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Status, value);

  public static void StatusIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
    => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Status);

  public static void StatusRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, global::Status, string?> value)
    => builder.Render(_ => _.Status, value);

  public static void StatusFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, FormulaContext<global::Employee>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Status, value);

  public static void StatusFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Employee>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Status, value);

  public static void StatusFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
    => builder.Filter(_ => _.Status);

  public static void StatusInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, bool value)
    => builder.Include(_ => _.Status, value);

  public static void StatusExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
    => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Status);

  public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> BackupColumn(
    this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
    Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, global::Status?>> configuration)
    => builder.Column(_ => _.Backup, configuration);

  public static void BackupHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
    => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Backup, value);

    => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Backup, value);

    => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Backup, value);

    => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Backup, value);

  public static void BackupCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, global::Status?> value)
    => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Backup, value);

    => builder.Format(_ => _.Backup, value);

    => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Backup, value);

  public static void BackupIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
    => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Backup);

  public static void BackupRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, global::Status?, string?> value)
    => builder.Render(_ => _.Backup, value);

  public static void BackupFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, FormulaContext<global::Employee>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Backup, value);

  public static void BackupFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Employee>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Backup, value);

  public static void BackupFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
    => builder.Filter(_ => _.Backup);

    => builder.Include(_ => _.Backup, value);

    => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Backup);
